case_title: NICOLAS FLORES VS. CHARLES W. MEIBEYER

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT. NOTICE REGARDING CHALLENGE OF VENUE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2010 - CONTINUED TO MAR-25-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CHALLENGE VENUE IS DENIED. COURT FINDS THAT THE CONTRACT WAS ENTERED INTO BY PLAINTIFF IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY. TRIAL IS SET FOR MARCH 25, 2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 506. APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
